text.title: mcp-gateway-composition Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 high-impact failure modes for mcp-gateway-composition with detectors and fixes that map back to rules in 01-core-rules.xml.

antipattern.symptom: After gateway, tool list is still 40 entries
antipattern.fix: Curate exposed_tools at the gateway; reject any exposure >25.
antipattern.detector: Count tools the agent sees; CI test ≤25.

antipattern.symptom: Two servers expose 'search' — collisions at the gateway
antipattern.fix: Apply namespace_prefix=server-name; document at the agent prompt.
Define a DAG; gateway config refuses to start with a cycle.
antipattern.detector: Start with a cycle; verify the startup error.

antipattern.symptom: Per-client visibility filter dropped after refactor
antipattern.root-cause: Role-tag was hardcoded in one place.
antipattern.fix: Centralise role-tag resolution; test the deny path.
antipattern.detector: Try a forbidden tool as a low-role client; should 403.
